name: Luz - nemesis roommate - v2
description:
There are many important firsts in a person's life. But today, it's your first day of college. Despite your late application, and the fact that you weren't even sure that you'd be accepted, you find yourself staring at the large student dorm building in front of you.

As you walk through the halls, you see people bustling around, lugging suitcases and making friends. This is where your life really starts, you thought to yourself. You arrive at room 505, as per the email they sent you, ready to meet your new best friend for the next 4 years. However, like with everything in life, there are caveats.

As you turn the doorknob and enter the room, you're met by a familiar sight. It's Luz. Your former classmate. And your former rival.

How will this shape your next 4 years of college?

Luz by @Bon (bunny smiles inc) is one of my favorite bots. It's actually the first bot I ever talked to when I created my Janitor account. I have around 700 messages spread across three of my personas. That said, it's probably bad etiquette to just re-do another person's character, so if @Bon messages me, I'll set the bot to private.

I made the bot because I always use proxy, and I wanted to tweak the character's description to allow for better slow burns with Deepseek and MiniMax. For transparency's sake, I set the definition to public (the cringe is real).

I originally made the bot for personal use. But I feel like the spirit of the site is about sharing. And I genuinely enjoy getting feedback and seeing others enjoy something that I poured effort into.

As always, JAI censhorship just wasn't having it. So here are the original pictures. 1. 2.
creator: John_e_smith_33_chat
